treaty.title: China-Netherlands Tax Treaty
notes: v3 prepares the dataset for future semi-automated treaty ingestion
article metadata, paragraph anchors, and rules are now separated

articles.summary: Defines treaty treatment for dividends between the two jurisdictions.
notes: Beneficial ownership and factual qualification may matter.

paragraphs.source_excerpt: Dividend treatment is governed by Article 10(1), subject to treaty conditions and factual qualification.

conditions: Treaty applicability depends on the facts of the payment.
rules.review_reason: Final eligibility depends on facts beyond v1 scope.

articles.summary: Defines treaty treatment for interest between the two jurisdictions.
notes: Beneficial ownership and factual qualification may matter.

paragraphs.source_excerpt: Interest treatment is governed by Article 11(1), subject to treaty conditions and factual qualification.

conditions: Treaty applicability depends on the facts of the payment.
rules.review_reason: Final eligibility depends on facts beyond v1 scope.

articles.summary: Defines treaty treatment for royalties between the two jurisdictions.
notes: Beneficial ownership and factual qualification may matter.

paragraphs.source_excerpt: Royalty treatment is governed by Article 12(1), subject to treaty conditions and factual qualification.

conditions: Treaty applicability depends on the facts of the payment.
rules.review_reason: Final eligibility depends on facts beyond v1 scope.
